title: Forever

notes: QQ Music gives the 1999 album track title as 这就是人生; the 2002 concert/live-album material uses C'est La Vie.

title: Windflowers
notes: QQ Music titles the 1999 track Windflowers; the 2003 live album uses Windflower. Live-release notes identify Seals and Crofts as original performer context.

title: I Swear
notes: QQ Music lists Chyi Yu on I Swear placements in the Sandy Lam-led album and the later C'est La Vie album. Writer/composer credits remain pending.

title: Rhythm Of My Heart

title: What A Wonderful World

title: Turning
notes: Modeled as a Chyi Yu voice appearance rather than a Chyi Yu release. QQ Music has both a 1998 collaboration candidate listing Chyi Yu and Suzanne Ciani on the title track and the user-supplied 1999 Suzanne Ciani album context; fuller booklet credits remain pending.
